payload.answer: I can help, but I don’t know which specific thing from yesterday you mean. Please identify it or give me a clue so I can suggest repair options.
repair_options: Ask the user to specify which memory from yesterday they mean.
Offer a brief list of candidate interpretations if any context is available.
Keep the request unresolved until the user provides more detail.
